When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libqt6bluetooth6-bin with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libqt6bluetooth6-bin --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
